history.details: SDD initialized for Vector OS Nano SDK
3-pillar deep analysis complete: pick reliability, developer terminal, multi-agent orchestration. CEO architecture discussion concluded.
Writing spec.md based on CEO-approved architecture: SDK-first, ROS2-optional, cross-platform, generalizable robot framework
Wave 1 all tasks done. T1 (Alpha) 164 tests, T2 (Beta) 113 tests, T3 (Gamma) 89 tests. Total: 281/281 passing. Gate MET.
Wave 2 all tasks done. T4 (Alpha LLM) 79 tests, T5 (Beta perception) 20 tests, T6 (Gamma skills) 72 tests. Total: 452/452 passing. No regressions.
Wave 3 all tasks done. T7 (Alpha agent) 36 tests, T8 (Beta CLI) 25 tests, T9 (Gamma ROS2) 26 tests. Total: 539/539 passing. No regressions.
Wave 4 tasks 10, 11, 13 done. T10 (Alpha calibration wizard) 28 tests, T11 (Beta PyBullet sim) 75 tests, T13 (Gamma README/examples) no new tests. Total: 642/642 passing. T12 (dashboard) in progress.
